heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 298d Authorization of appropriations
notes: CodificationSection was classified to prior to renumbering by .section 297q of this titlePub. L. 111–148

Amendments2020— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and inserted heading, substituted “$137,837,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2025” for “$338,000,000 for fiscal year 2010, and such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2011 through 2016”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 116–1362010—, amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to authorization of appropriations for fiscal years 1998 through 2002, allocations of amounts, and use of methodology.Pub. L. 111–148, § 5312

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out parts B, C, and D (subject to ), there are authorized to be appropriated $137,837,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2025.section 297t(g) of this title

children.heading: Part E
children.label: b Part E
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out part E, there are authorized to be appropriated $117,135,000 for each of the fiscal years 2021 through 2025.
